storm_brand.prompt: Celestial staff that marks enemies before calling down a starfall finisher.
storm_brand.visual_description: A star-forged staff crackling with stormlight.

orbit_furnace.prompt: Molten staff that seeds orbiting embers before a divebomb finisher.
orbit_furnace.tooltip: Builds a furnace ring before the embers dive.
orbit_furnace.visual_description: A furnace-core staff ringed by cinder glyphs.

frost_shatter.prompt: Glacial staff that freezes enemies until the crystal fan bursts outward.
frost_shatter.tooltip: Cold pressure builds until the ice bursts.
frost_shatter.visual_description: A glacial stave shedding crystalline frost.

legacy_shot_style.prompt: Legacy staff that still uses sky-strike projectile behavior without a combat package.
legacy_shot_style.visual_description: An heirloom staff traced with falling-star runes.
